narrative:
Bellbrook City has 5,500 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.1% D−R vs -29.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
